title: Proclamation No. 2041, s. 2010
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 2041

DECLARING FRIDAY, MAY 14, 2010, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE PROVINCE OF ALBAY

WHEREAS, Friday, May 14, 2010, marks the Foundation Day anniversary of the Province of Albay;

WHEREAS, it is but fitting and proper that the people of the Province of Albay be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, LEANDRO R. MENDOZA, Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, do hereby declare Friday, May 14, 2010, as special (non-working) day in the Province of Albay.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 20 th day of April, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Ten.

By authority of the President:

Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary:

Deputy Executive Secretary for Legal Affairs
